about.title: About AImenu
about.intro: AImenu connects diners with great restaurants across Georgia — from QR-scan ordering at the table to advance reservations and rewards.
about.missionBody: Make eating out effortless: discover places, order, pay, and earn rewards from one app.
about.howBody: We partner with restaurants to bring their menus, loyalty programs and reservations into a single, fast experience.
about.teamBody: Built in Tbilisi by a small team of engineers and designers who love eating out as much as you do.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: We're here to help with anything related to your account, orders or reservations.
contact.hours: Support is available 7 days a week, 09:00–22:00 (GE).

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using AImenu you agree to the following terms. Please read them carefully.
terms.s1Body: You must be 16 or older to use AImenu. You're responsible for keeping your account credentials safe.
terms.s2Body: Orders and reservations placed through AImenu are confirmed by participating restaurants. Cancellations follow each restaurant's policy.
terms.s3Body: Payments are processed by our partner payment provider. Refunds, where applicable, are issued back to the original method.
terms.s4Body: Rewards, points and wallet credit have no cash value and may expire. We may adjust program rules with advance notice.
terms.s5Body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use after an update means you accept the new version.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have.
privacy.s1Body: Account details (name, email, phone), order and reservation history, device information, and — with your permission — camera access for QR scanning.
privacy.s2Body: To run your account, process orders and reservations, support loyalty and referral rewards, prevent fraud, and improve the app.
privacy.s3Body: We share necessary information with the restaurants you transact with and with our payment provider. We never sell your data.
privacy.s4Body: You can update or delete your account from Settings, or contact us to request a copy of your data.
privacy.s5Body: Questions about privacy? Reach us via the Contact screen.

loyalty.title: Loyalty

rules.title: How loyalty works
rules.heroTitle: Earn rewards every time you order
rules.heroLead: Buy your favorites at participating restaurants and unlock free items, discounts, and tier perks.
rules.step1: Place orders or scan in-restaurant to earn punches and points.
rules.step2: Watch your tier and your free-item progress fill up automatically.
rules.step3: Claim your reward in the app — show the QR code at the counter.
rules.earningRule1: Each completed order adds points based on the order total.
rules.earningRule2: Punch-card programs reward repeat purchases of specific items.
rules.earningRule3: Tier discounts apply automatically at checkout once unlocked.
rules.optInNote: Programs vary by restaurant. Each venue chooses which items count and how rewards are claimed.

referral.howItWorks3: You earn wallet credit you can spend on any order.
